articles.author: Maher Kawash, Terrell Brown, ABC7 Chicago Digital Team
articles.title: Chicago, Illinois weather: Tornadoes leave damage across area in Streator, NW Indiana - ABC7 Chicago
articles.description: National Weather Service to send tornado damage teams to Streator, Bartlett, NW Indiana, Naperville
articles.content:
CHICAGO (WLS) -- Cleanup across the Chicago area is underway after strong thunderstorms spawned at least two confirmed tornadoes Thursday.
The National Weather Service will be sending team out to su… [+3052 chars]
